title: Velvety Cheese Fritters
description: A simple and delicious fritter recipe made with velvety cheese and a crunchy exterior. Perfect as a snack or appetizer.
instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 375°F (190°C).
Mix the shredded velvety cheese, salt, and grated cheese in a bowl.
Add the flour to the cheese mixture and stir until well combined.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the cheese mixture into the hot oil.
Fry the fritters for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Remove the fritters from the oil with a slotted spoon and place on paper towels to drain excess oil.
Serve the fritters hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
